scores.correctness_notes: The agent correctly demonstrates the requires side using IngressPerAppRequirer, events (ready/revoked), and the .url property. Uses v2 which is valid (gold standard notes v1/v2). The approach is consistent with the data schema shown in the gold standard (port passed to the requirer maps to the application-data port field).
scores.hallucination_notes: none — IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, .url, on.ready, on.revoked, IngressPerUnitRequirer, and the port/scheme/strip_prefix parameters all exist in the traefik-k8s library
